settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDescription: Choose how Wooly Wonder looks or create your own color combination.
settings.languageDescription: Select the language used throughout the application.
settings.customColorsDescription: Changes are applied and saved automatically.
settings.settingsFileDescription: All your settings are stored in a single JSON file that you can share with other users.
settings.settingsFileHint: Copy this file to share your preferences. To apply them on another computer, replace its settings.json and restart the application.
